narrative:
Ashtabula County has 58,689 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.4% of registrants.
